person_name: Liberius, Praetorian Prefect of Gaul and Patrician under Theoderic (fl. late 5th–early 6th c.)
person_name_full: Liberius, Praetorian Prefect of Gaul and Patrician under Theoderic (fl. late 5th–early 6th c.)
notes: Praetorian Prefect of Gaul and Patrician under Theoderic, noted for his popularity and political role in late 5th to early 6th century.

docs.title: Letter 2016
docs.author: Cassiodorus
docs.subject_summary: Book 2, Letter XVI: SENATUI URBIS ROMAE
docs.excerpt: Even when his master's cause was nearly lost, no threats could make him waver. He stood immovable through the ruin of his prince. The novelty of the situation could not unsettle a man whom even the ferocity of barbarian peoples had
